Task description section 2, GL Distribution creation instructions; verified against verifier.py logic which checks for distribution header with name='Marketing Split 2025'; GL Distribution table supports NAME column per GL Distribution (Window ID-323) documentation

privileged_info_summary: Task creates synthetic data in iDempiere's GardenWorld environment. Two marketing campaigns will be created with search keys SPRING2025 and SUMMER2025, with names 'Spring Promotion 2025' and 'Summer Blowout 2025' respectively. A GL Distribution named 'Marketing Split 2025' will be created to allocate costs between these campaigns with allocation percentages of 60% for Spring and 40% for Summer. All data structures (C_CAMPAIGN table with VALUE and NAME columns, GL_DISTRIBUTION and GL_DISTRIBUTIONLINE tables with PERCENT column) are standard iDempiere features confirmed in official documentation.
